---
title: "About"
format: html
---

Hierarchical grouping and visual summary of Canada Energy Regulator's EF2023 data.

**Note on years:** Years 2022 (latest current data),
2030 (interim near-net-zero target),
2035 (*negotiated* interim near-net-zero target as per the [Canada-Alberta MOU](https://www.pm.gc.ca/en/news/backgrounders/2025/11/27/canada-alberta-memorandum-understanding)),
and 2050 (target year as per EF2023/the [Canadian Net-Zero Emissions Accountability Act](https://www.canada.ca/en/services/environment/weather/climatechange/climate-plan/net-zero-emissions-2050/canadian-net-zero-emissions-accountability-act.html))
are highlighted.

**Note on tabs:** Tabs are sorted by decreasing total quantity (as per value cards).
This means the top category is listed second, following Total.

**Hierarchy:**
```
 ─┬ Production
  │ ├ Crude Oil
  │ │ ├ Total
  │ │ ├ (Upgraded Bitumen)
  │ │ ├ C5+
  │ │ ├ Conventional Heavy
  │ │ ├ Conventional Light
  │ │ ├ Field Condensate
  │ │ ├ In Situ Bitumen
  │ │ └ Mined Bitumen
  │ ├ Hydrogen
  │ │ ├ Total* (*calculated) (PENDING)
  │ │ ├ Biomass
  │ │ ├ Electrolysis
  │ │ └ Natural gas with CCS
  │ └ Natural Gas
  │   ├ Total
  │   ├ Solution
  │   ├ Non Associated
  │   ├ Tight
  │   ├ Shale
  │   ├ Coalbed Methane
  │   └ ...
  └ Prices
    ├ Benchmark Prices
    └ ... End-use Prices
...

```
